info.english_meaning: to be satisfied to be contended to repel to cheat to betray
info.hindI_arTa: tfpta honA saMtuzwa honA cakamA denA DoKA denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: tfptyAvityeva svAmikASyapO  " pratIGAte ca tfptO ca cakate cakatIti tu  tfptimAtre cakerasya mittvAt cakayatIti RO " (Slo. 40) iti devaH  ' tfptO akarmakaH pratiGAte sakarmaka:' iti bAlamanoramA
